chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D – 1039 of 2017. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 08.02.2018. FOR KATCHA PESHI. Mr. Sikandar Ali Khaskheli, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. along with Inspector Sikandar Ali Soomro S.H.O. Tando Ghulam Ali and Ex. S.H.O. I.O. SIP Shahnawaz present. Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari, A.P.G. -------- At the very outset learned counsel for the petitioners submits that in this case the learned trial Magistrate has already taken the cognizance and the case is pending before the trial court. He further submits that he would be satisfied and shall not press this constitution petition if the petitioner is allowed to file proceedings for his pre-mature acquittal. Learned A.A.G. & A.P.G. has raised their no objection on the above proposition. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of. However, the petitioners would be at liberty to file any application with regard to pre- mature acquittal of the petitioner before the trial court and trial court shall decide the same in accordance with law. Office is directed to immediately send the copy of this order to the trial court for information. JUDGE JUDGE A.
